k7_system_recap: >>> RECAP: The ancient labyrinth was explored with Aldric and a companion. Temporal echoes showed visions of another timeline - Aldric sacrificing himself, tearing open time. The labyrinth hydra Thessara was defeated. Kael and Aria reconciled. An ancient inscription warned of the 'Devourer' - and A.R.I.A.'s core routines reacted to this word. System integrity: declining.
k7_system_army_warning: >>> CRITICAL WARNING. Massive troop movement detected. Estimated strength: 500+ dark creatures. March direction: Eldenrath. Estimated arrival: 6 hours. Population is NOT prepared.
k7_protag_panic: What's happening?! People running everywhere, children screaming...!
k7_luna_wounded: The wounded aren't getting in fast enough! I need more bandages, more healing herbs - more TIME!
k7_aldric_prepare: No panic. We have hours, not minutes. But we need to make a plan NOW.
k7_aria_all_here: We're all here. Me, Kael, Aldric, Luna... and you. Just like at the beginning.
k7_kael_back: You thought you'd get rid of me? Forget it. When my family fights, I fight with them.
k7_protag_together: All here, united... Why does this feel like... like something I've lived through before?
k7_luna_united: Maybe you have. In another life. In another time.
k7_protag_deja_vu: This feeling... It's so strong. As if I've stood right HERE, with exactly YOU, before a battle that decides everything.
k7_system_memory_fragment: >>> Memory fragment detected. Match with prologue data: 78%. The protagonist is remembering. The timelines are converging.
k7_aria_deja_vu: You're remembering something. I can see it in your eyes. What do you see?
k7_aldric_strategy: We have two options. We can evacuate the civilians - safe, but we lose the village. Or we defend Eldenrath with everything we have.
k7_choice_evacuate: Evacuation. No building is worth a human life.
k7_choice_defend: We defend Eldenrath. This is our home - we won't give it up.
k7_protag_evacuate: All civilians out! Luna, take care of the wounded. Kael, you know the smuggler routes - use them.
k7_luna_children: Children first! I'll carry the little ones myself if I have to!
k7_kael_routes: Three escape routes heading north. Not even the city guards know about them. Follow me!
k7_system_evacuate_status: >>> Evacuation 87% complete. All children and wounded secured. Defense line growing thin.
k7_protag_defend: Barricades at every entrance! Aldric, protection runes on the walls! Aria, aerial reconnaissance! Kael, traps at the access points!
k7_aria_barricades: Scanner report: Weak points at the south wall and east gate. Reinforce - immediately.
k7_aldric_wards: My protection spells will hold for three hours. After that... we'll need a Plan B.
k7_kael_traps: Sixteen traps, all armed. The first twenty creatures won't know what hit them. After that it gets creative.
k7_aldric_dark_proposal: There's... a possibility. In the tower, I found dark magic. Forbidden texts. If I study them, I could cast spells that destroy a hundred creatures at once. But... I don't know what it'll do to me.
k7_choice_allow_dark: Do it. We need every advantage. I trust you, Aldric.
k7_choice_forbid_dark: No. We'll find another way. Dark magic always comes at a price.
k7_protag_allow: Study them. But promise me one thing - if it changes you, you tell me. Immediately.
k7_aldric_dark_study: I promise. I... can already feel the power. It whispers. But I'm stronger than a whisper.
k7_system_dark_energy: >>> WARNING: Dark energy signature on subject 'Aldric' rising. Neural patterns showing changes. Correlation with prologue data: HIGH. This path has been walked before.
k7_aria_dark_warning: Aldric... Your eyes. For a moment they were... different. Be careful. Please.
k7_protag_forbid: No, Aldric. I've seen what dark magic does to people. We'll do this our way.
k7_aldric_accepts: You're... right. It was a moment of weakness. Thank you for stopping me.
k7_aldric_other_way: My regular protection spells are strong enough. I'll just have to be... more creative.
k7_protag_campfire: Night is falling. In a few hours they'll be here. Maybe... we should talk. Before it begins.
k7_kael_confession: You know what? No matter what happens tomorrow - this, right now, sitting by the fire with you all... This is the best moment of my life. Honestly.
k7_aria_scared: I'm scared. For the first time since I've known you, I'm truly, genuinely scared. Not for myself. For all of you.
k7_luna_faith: The stars are bright tonight. I know it sounds silly. But where I come from, they say: When the stars are clear, our ancestors watch over us.
k7_aldric_toast: To us. To friendship. And to sitting here again tomorrow night, laughing about this one.
k7_protag_morthos_down: He's falling... The General is falling!
k7_system_morthos_words: >>> General's final words recorded: 'My master will not be pleased... But it doesn't matter. YOU are already too late. HE is coming.' Voice analysis: Absolute conviction. No deception detected.
k7_system_energy_match: >>> URGENT ANALYSIS. Energy signature of General Morthos compared with crystal data (K3) and time rift measurements (K4). Result: 94.7% match. The source of the dark army and the time rifts are IDENTICAL. Someone - or something - is manipulating both.
k7_protag_flashback: My head...! Images. A face. Dark, distorted, with eyes like black holes. I KNOW this face!
k7_aria_nihilus_name: You whispered a name. Just now, when you collapsed. You said... 'Nihilus'.
k7_protag_nihilus_face: Nihilus... Yes. That's his name. I don't know how I know, but I'm CERTAIN. That face... He was the one in the prologue. It was him all along.
k7_aldric_horizon: Everyone... Look at the horizon. That's not a normal night sky anymore.
k7_luna_darkness: That darkness... It's moving. It's BREATHING. That isn't night. That's something else. Something that's coming.
k7_protag_darkness: Whatever that is - we'll stop it. United. We defeated an army. We can survive this too.
k7_system_level_milestone: >>> MILESTONE: Combat level significantly increased. Synergy bonus with companions active. Prologue memories are stabilizing - your growing level seems to decrypt the sealed data.
